_meta.source: EMCS Platform — Marketing & Brand Identity Export
_meta.description: Comprehensive brand identity, design system, messaging framework, and marketing assets extracted from canadaemcs.com and the EMCS codebase. Use this file for brand consistency across all marketing channels, partnerships, and media kits.

extractedFrom.method: Firecrawl branding extraction + codebase CSS design tokens + i18n content

identity.name: EMCS
identity.tagline: Ontario-accredited online education for students worldwide
identity.motto: Learn First. Decide Later. Succeed Safely.
identity.accreditation: Ontario Ministry of Education Inspected Private School
identity.marketPosition: Premier Ontario-accredited online school serving international students in 130+ countries

brand.mission: To make high-quality Canadian education accessible, flexible, and supported—wherever students are in the world.
brand.vision: Empowering students globally to achieve academic excellence through Ontario's world-class curriculum, delivered with innovation and personal support.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We maintain the highest standards in curriculum delivery, assessment, and student support.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Quality education should be available to all students, regardless of location or circumstances.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We leverage technology to create engaging and effective learning experiences that prepare students for the future.

support.title: Support
support.description: Every student receives personalized guidance throughout their educational journey.

personality.targetAudience: International students (Grades 1–12) and their parents seeking accredited Canadian education online

brand.description: Deep forest green — conveys trust, prestige, Canadian identity

accent.description: Regal gold — signals premium quality and achievement

secondary.description: Used for links and interactive elements

canadian.description: Canadian red — used for national identity branding

logo.description: EMCS wordmark in Outfit Bold (forest green #1B4332) with a gold accent underline (#D4AF37) under the 'E'

seo.title: EMCS | Toronto EMCS | Online OSSD
seo.metaDescription: EMCS - Toronto EMCS. Earn your Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) online from anywhere in the world.

hero.headline: Your Path to a Canadian Education
hero.subheadline: Build academic foundations from Grade 1 or earn your Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) 100% online from anywhere in the world. Study at your own pace with Ontario Certified Teachers.

valuePropositions.title: Study From Anywhere
valuePropositions.description: Learn from Vietnam, Canada, or anywhere globally. All you need is an internet connection. No study permit required for online courses.

valuePropositions.title: Your Schedule, Your Pace
valuePropositions.description: Start anytime—we offer continuous enrollment year-round. Complete courses in as little as 4 weeks or take up to 12 months.

valuePropositions.title: Ontario Certified Teachers
valuePropositions.description: All credit courses are delivered by teachers in good standing with the Ontario College of Teachers (OCT), with real classroom experience.

valuePropositions.title: Globally Recognized Credentials
valuePropositions.description: Our OSSD credits are the same as those earned in traditional Ontario schools—recognized by universities in Canada, the US, UK, Australia, and worldwide.

howItWorks.title: Register Anytime
howItWorks.description: Sign up 365 days a year. No deadlines, no waitlists. Continuous enrollment means you start when you're ready.

howItWorks.title: Learn at Your Pace
howItWorks.description: Access course materials 24/7. Our asynchronous platform fits your schedule—study when it works for you.

howItWorks.title: Get Teacher Support
howItWorks.description: Ontario Certified Teachers respond to questions within 48 hours. Office hours available for real-time help.

howItWorks.title: Earn Your Credential
howItWorks.description: Credits appear on official Ontario transcripts. Marks sent directly to OUAC, OCAS, and your day school.

accreditation.title: Ministry Inspected Private School
accreditation.statement: EMCS is inspected by the Ontario Ministry of Education and authorized to grant credits toward the Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD).
accreditation.details: Our credits hold the same value as those earned in traditional Ontario day schools and are recognized by all Canadian colleges and universities. Transcripts are sent directly to OUAC, OCAS, and educational institutions worldwide.

callToAction.headline: Ready to Start Your Canadian Education Journey?
callToAction.subheadline: Join students from over 130 countries learning with EMCS. Register today and access your course within 24-48 hours.

socialProof.headline: Our Graduates Attend Top Institutions Worldwide
socialProof.subheadline: OSSD credentials are recognized globally. Our students have been accepted to universities across Canada, the United States, United Kingdom, Australia, and beyond.

footer.tagline: Ontario-accredited online education for students worldwide

overview.headline: ONTARIO CURRICULUM PROGRAMS (Grades 1–12)
overview.motto: Learn First. Decide Later. Succeed Safely.
overview.description: We offer Ontario Curriculum-aligned learning for students in Grades 1–12 through two flexible pathways: the Academic Preparation Program (Non-Ontario student record) and the Official Ontario Program (Ontario student record). Students may start with preparation learning and upgrade to credit-bearing courses when academically ready.

academicPreparation.name: Academic Preparation Program
academicPreparation.subtitle: (Non-Ontario student record)
academicPreparation.description: The Academic Preparation Program builds strong foundations in Academic English, mathematics, science, social studies, and essential learning skills. Aligned with Ontario standards, it develops analytical thinking and disciplined study habits, preparing students for a smooth transition into OSSD credit courses or the Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) program.

officialOntario.name: Official Ontario Program
officialOntario.subtitle: (Ontario student record)
officialOntario.description: The Official Ontario Program is a fully accredited Canadian secondary education pathway designed for students pursuing academic excellence and global university opportunities. Aligned with Ontario curriculum standards, the program emphasizes strong academic foundations, critical thinking, and disciplined learning. With personalized academic guidance and a structured learning environment, students are prepared for university admission in Canada and internationally. Upon successful completion, students earn the Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD).
officialOntario.assessment: Graded courses with records and credits

purpose.academicPrep: Preparation for entry into the Official Ontario Program

academicFocus.academicPrep: Math, English, Science, and Social Studies
academicFocus.officialOntario: Math, English, Science, and Social Studies

assessment.officialOntario: Graded courses with records and credits

progression.academicPrep: Pathway to the Official Ontario Program

featuredPrograms.title: Ontario Primary Foundation Program
highlights: Academic Preparation (Self-Learning, Non-Ontario student record): From $50 CAD per course or $300 CAD for the full-year 6-subject bundle.
Upgrade to Ontario Official Program (Ontario student record): $400 CAD per course, or $1,800 CAD per year for the full 6-subject bundle.
Live Teacher-Led Primary Foundation (with Ontario report card): $4,500 CAD per year (premium teacher-led pathway).

featuredPrograms.title: Middle School Foundation (Grades 6 to 8)
highlights: Academic Preparation (Non-Credit): $50 per course, $300 CAD for the full-year 6-subject bundle.
Upgrade to Ontario Official Program (Ontario student record): $400 per course, $1,800 CAD per year.
Entrance Test Fee: $50 CAD (non-refundable). Registration Fee: $50 CAD.

featuredPrograms.title: Ontario High School Pathways (Grades 9 to 12)
highlights: Academic Preparation Program (Non-Credit): Skills-focused preparation with no Ontario student record.
Official Ontario Program: Credit-bearing, Ontario student record, leading to the Ontario Secondary School Diploma.
Registration Fee: $100 CAD. Entrance Test Fee: $50 CAD.
Grade 9 and Grade 10 = 8-credit one-year programs. Grade 11 and Grade 12 = 7-credit one-year programs.
